raw_idea: Use pricing anchors so your middle plan feels like the safe choice
research_context: Pricing psychology research shows anchors shape perceived value before feature comparisons begin
hook: If buyers jump to cheapest, your anchor tier is broken
thesis: A visible premium anchor clarifies the value of the middle plan and reduces price shock

talking_points: Call out the pricing mistake buyers spot first
Most pricing pages lead with features but buyers lead with price
evidence_citations: Behavioral pricing research from MIT SMR
beats.hook: If buyers jump to cheapest, your anchor tier is broken

talking_points: Compare two-tier vs three-tier pricing setups
Focus on what the middle tier solves, not what it includes
beats.cta: Audit your middle plan against the decoy effect

cta: Audit your middle plan against the decoy effect

beat-001: Behavioral pricing research from MIT SMR
